value_chain_position: Cyber resilience and data security platform — sells immutable backup, ransomware recovery and data observability for hybrid-cloud enterprises; the last line of defense in AI-era data protection.
relative_comps: Rubrik is the fastest-growing data-security name at meaningful scale: 46% YoY, 30% 3-year CAGR, 22% FCF margin — all built on a subscription transition from a perpetual-license base. The immutable architecture is architecturally superior to legacy Veeam/CommVault for ransomware recovery; this creates genuine switching costs once deployed at enterprise scale. Veeam and Cohesity are private direct rivals; CommVault (CVLT) is the closest public comp. AI infrastructure relevance is real but indirect — Rubrik protects AI-era data estates rather than accelerating compute. Theme fit is medium-high; fintech_rails hint is incorrect.
